g.text: — would run these read-only checks against http://localhost:8081:
Is the app served over HTTPS with a valid, current certificate?
CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, nosniff, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy.
Server/tech version banners exposed in responses.
OPTIONS — flags risky verbs (TRACE/PUT/DELETE) exposed without auth.
The domain's SPF + DMARC DNS records — spoofing defense.
